action.reasoning: Observation: official eval now reaches dataloader/audio reading, so path resolution is fixed; the remaining failure is soundfile.LibsndfileError during predict-time loading in worker processes. Analysis: this is likely due to brittle FLAC decoding in multiprocessing or a single problematic file causing worker crash; the safest fix is to make predict.py robust by avoiding multi-worker decode, adding fallback audio loading via torchaudio/librosa, and fully rewriting the truncated file so offline inference is deterministic. Decision: rewrite predict.py completely with resilient test-root discovery, single-process loading, decode fallback, length bucketing, and local-only artifact loading; verify locally on tmp_pred_data and resubmit the existing checkpoint immediately to get the first official score before more training.
